_meta.purpose: Surfaces where mathematical/technical content is load-bearing — the math IS the argument. Sloppytoppy applies elevated length thresholds (target_max × 1.5) and disables the jargon-density penalty. Curated by operator + tinker; sloppytoppy reads but does not modify. PROP-039 reference.
_meta.seed_rationale: Tinker's proposed seed (PROP-039 Q-OP-6). Operator confirmed defaults 2026-05-16. Expand as needed via direct file edit. 2026-05-16 cleanup: removed 2 placeholder IDs (part4.html#falsifiability-geometry, part4.html#solar-distance-derivation) that did not match any <details> block in data/sections.json (per sloppytoppy first-run flag-mismatch warning). Surfaces in part4 are p4-41-0, p4-42-1, p4-421..427, p4-43-2, p4-44-3, registry-framing-audit — no falsifiability-geometry or solar-distance-derivation equivalent. If math-dense flagging is needed for part4 in the future, add by actual block ID.
